summary: Completed testing of Procurement Module (Material Requests + Supplier Invoice Intake + Warehouse Posting). All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: /procurement page with tabs, new invoice dialog, review dialog with lines, 'Заявка материали' button in offer editor, sidebar 'Снабдяване' link.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <span> inside <tr>/<tbody> - does not affect functionality, cosmetic warning only
Minor: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' warning in dialogs - accessibility improvement suggested

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/material-requests correctly creates requests with lines and project link, auto-generates MR-XXXX number
GET /api/material-requests returns requests with project_code and project_name populated
POST /api/material-requests/from-offer/{id} generates MR from offer lines + suggested materials from AI checklists
POST /api/supplier-invoices creates invoice with status='uploaded', posted_to_warehouse=false
PUT /api/supplier-invoices/{id} with lines auto-computes totals with discount: final_price = unit_price * (1 - discount/100)
PUT /api/supplier-invoices/{id} with lines changes status from 'uploaded' to 'reviewed'
POST /api/supplier-invoices/{id}/post-to-warehouse creates warehouse transaction with full line details
Cannot post same invoice twice - returns 400 'Already posted to warehouse'
POST to warehouse auto-creates Main Warehouse if not exists (type='main')
Warehouse transaction links to: supplier_id, source_invoice_id, project_id, invoice_number
GET /api/warehouse-transactions lists intake transactions with full line details
Frontend: /procurement page has tabs for Заявки (Requests) and Входящи фактури (Invoices)
Frontend: 'Входяща фактура' button opens create dialog with invoice number, date, supplier, project fields
Frontend: Review dialog shows editable lines with material_name, qty, unit, dimension_spec, unit_price, discount_percent
Frontend: Review dialog auto-computes line totals and overall total
Frontend: 'Приеми в склад' button visible for reviewed invoices, posts to warehouse
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Снабдяване' navigation link pointing to /procurement
Frontend: Offer editor has 'Заявка материали' button (data-testid='create-mr-btn') visible for Accepted/Sent offers
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed material requests, supplier invoices, and offers during testing. Draft MRs cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procurement module fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/material-requests, GET /api/material-requests, POST /api/material-requests/from-offer/{id}, POST /api/supplier-invoices, PUT /api/supplier-invoices/{id} (adds lines, sets reviewed), POST /api/supplier-invoices/{id}/post-to-warehouse (creates warehouse transaction), GET /api/warehouse-transactions. Frontend: /procurement?tab=requests for material requests, /procurement?tab=invoices for supplier invoices. Invoice review dialog has 'Приеми в склад' button. Offer editor has 'Заявка материали' button for Sent/Accepted offers. Existing test invoices: SF-2026-0045 (posted), TEST_Supplier_ABC invoices (reviewed/posted).

POST /api/material-requests.notes: Creates request with lines, project link, auto-generated MR-XXXX number, status='draft'

GET /api/material-requests.notes: Lists requests with project_code and project_name populated

GET /api/material-requests/{id}.notes: Returns full request with all lines

POST /api/material-requests/from-offer/{.notes: Generates MR from offer lines, includes source_offer_id, stage_name

PUT /api/supplier-invoices/{id} with lin.notes: Adds lines, computes totals with discount, sets status='reviewed'

POST /api/supplier-invoices/{id}/post-to.notes: Creates warehouse transaction, marks invoice as posted

GET /api/warehouse-transactions.notes: Lists intake transactions with supplier, invoice, project links

Frontend: /procurement page loads.notes: Page loads with correct title and tabs

Frontend: 'Входяща фактура' button.notes: Opens create dialog with invoice_number, date, supplier, project fields

Frontend: Review dialog with lines.notes: Shows material_name, qty, unit, dimension_spec, unit_price, discount_percent, total

Frontend: 'Приеми в склад' button.notes: Present in review dialog for reviewed invoices

Frontend: Offer 'Заявка материали' butto.notes: Visible for Accepted/Sent offers with data-testid='create-mr-btn'

mocked_apis.note: OCR/AI invoice recognition is MOCKED - manual-first approach, lines are manually entered/edited in review dialog
mocked_apis.details: Invoice OCR functionality is AI-ready architecture but currently uses manual line entry
